translations.en: I am working on a project.
translations.vi: Tôi đang làm một dự án.
translations.hi: मैं एक प्रोजेक्ट पर काम कर रहा हूँ।
translations.ja: プロジェクトに取り組んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative singular (1st person); subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present, 1st person singular; main predicate. Commonly takes a prepositional complement (arbeiten an + Dativ).
Preposition selecting dative here; introduces the prepositional object indicating the thing being worked on.
Indefinite article, dative singular neuter; determiner agreeing with 'Projekt' in the PP 'an einem Projekt'.
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition 'an' in dative singular.

sentences.target: Unser Projekt braucht noch zwei Tage.

translations.de: Unser Projekt braucht noch zwei Tage.
translations.en: Our project needs two more days.
translations.es: Nuestro proyecto necesita dos días más.
translations.fr: Notre projet a encore besoin de deux jours.
translations.it: Il nostro progetto ha bisogno di altri due giorni.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的项目还需要两天。
translations.ru: Нашему проекту нужно ещё два дня.
translations.pt: Nosso projeto precisa de mais dois dias.
translations.vi: Dự án của chúng tôi cần thêm hai ngày nữa.
translations.nl: Ons project heeft nog twee dagen nodig.
translations.uk: Нашому проєкту потрібно ще два дні.
translations.hu: A projektünknek még két napra van szüksége.
translations.hi: हमारे प्रोजेक्ट को दो दिन और चाहिए।
translations.pl: Nasz projekt potrzebuje jeszcze dwóch dni.
translations.el: Το έργο μας χρειάζεται ακόμα δύο μέρες.
translations.nb: Prosjektet vårt trenger to dager til.
translations.id: Proyek kami masih butuh dua hari lagi.
translations.sv: Vårt projekt behöver två dagar till.
translations.ro: Proiectul nostru mai are nevoie de două zile.
translations.cs: Náš projekt potřebuje ještě dva dny.
translations.da: Vores projekt skal bruge to dage mere.
translations.ja: 私たちのプロジェクトにはあと2日必要です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Projekt'; agrees with the noun in gender/number/case (nominative singular neuter).
Common noun, neuter; subject of the sentence (nominative).
Finite verb, present, 3rd person singular; transitive verb taking a direct object ('zwei Tage').
Adverb indicating continuation/addition ('still / two more'). Modifies the verb phrase.
Cardinal numeral; quantifies the direct object 'Tage'.
Common noun, plural; direct object (accusative plural) of 'braucht'.

sentences.target: Du siehst dir mein Projekt kurz an.
sentences.reading: /du ziːst diːɐ̯ maɪ̯n pʁoˈjɛkt kʊʁts an/

translations.de: Du siehst dir mein Projekt kurz an.
translations.ipa: /du ziːst diːɐ̯ maɪ̯n pʁoˈjɛkt kʊʁts an/
translations.en: You take a quick look at my project.
translations.es: Le echas un vistazo rápido a mi proyecto.
translations.fr: Tu jettes un coup d’œil rapide à mon projet.
translations.it: Dai un’occhiata veloce al mio progetto.
translations.zh-Hans: 你快速看一下我的项目。
translations.yue: 你簡單睇一睇我個項目。
translations.pt: Você dá uma olhada rápida no meu projeto.
translations.he: אתה מעיף מבט קצר בפרויקט שלי.
translations.vi: Bạn xem qua dự án của tôi một chút.
translations.ar: أنت تلقي نظرة سريعة على مشروعي.
translations.nl: Je kijkt even naar mijn project.
translations.hi: तुम मेरे प्रोजेक्ट पर जल्दी से एक नज़र डालते हो।
translations.pl: Szybko rzucasz okiem na mój projekt.
translations.el: Ρίχνεις μια γρήγορη ματιά στο έργο μου.
translations.nb: Du tar en kjapp titt på prosjektet mitt.
translations.sv: Du tar en snabb titt på mitt пpoekt.
translations.ro: Arunci o privire rapidă la proiectul meu.
translations.cs: Rychle se podíváš na můj пpoekt.
translations.da: Du tager et hurtigt kig på mit projekt.
translations.ja: あなたは私のプロジェクトをさっと見ます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative singular (2nd person); subject.
Finite verb, present, 2nd person singular; together with the separable particle 'an' forms the verb 'ansehen' ('to look at').
Reflexive personal pronoun, dative singular (2nd person); indirect (dative) reflexive in the construction 'sich etwas ansehen'.
Possessive determiner; modifies 'Projekt' (accusative singular neuter).
Common noun, neuter; direct object (accusative) of the separable verb 'ansehen'.
Adverb of manner; modifies the verb phrase ('briefly').
Separable verbal particle completing the verb 'ansehen'; placed at the end of the clause.

sentences.target: Das Projekt kostet viel Zeit und Geld.
sentences.reading: /das pʁoˈjɛkt ˈkɔstət fiːl tsaɪ̯t ʊnt ɡɛlt/

translations.de: Das Projekt kostet viel Zeit und Geld.
translations.ipa: /das pʁoˈjɛkt ˈkɔstət fiːl tsaɪ̯t ʊnt ɡɛlt/
translations.en: The project costs a lot of time and money.
translations.es: El proyecto requiere mucho tiempo y dinero.
translations.fr: Le projet demande beaucoup de temps et d’argent.
translations.it: Il progetto richiede molto tempo e denaro.
translations.ko: 그 프로젝트는 시간과 돈이 많이 들어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个项目需要很多时间和钱。
translations.yue: 呢個項目好花時間同錢。
translations.ru: Проект требует много времени и денег.
translations.pt: O projeto exige muito tempo e dinheiro.
translations.tr: Proje çok zaman ve para gerektiriyor.
translations.vi: Dự án tốn rất nhiều thời gian và tiền.
translations.ar: المشروع يحتاج إلى الكثير من الوقت والمال.
translations.nl: Het project kost veel tijd en geld.
translations.uk: Проєкт потребує багато часу та грошей.
translations.hu: A projekt sok időt és pénzt igényel.
translations.hi: इस प्रोजेक्ट में बहुत समय और पैसा लगता है।
translations.pl: Projekt wymaga dużo czasu i pieniędzy.
translations.el: Το έργο απαιτεί πολύ χρόνο και χρήματα.
translations.nb: Prosjektet krever mye tid og penger.
translations.id: Proyek ini membutuhkan banyak waktu dan uang.
translations.sv: Projektet kräver mycket tid och pengar.
translations.ro: Proiectul necesită mult timp și bani.
translations.cs: Projekt vyžaduje hodně času a peněz.
translations.da: Projektet kræver meget tid og penge.
translations.fi: Projekti vaatii paljon aikaa ja rahaa.
translations.ja: そのプロジェクトは多くの時間とお金がかかります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular neuter; determiner of the subject noun.

Coordinating conjunction linking the two object nouns.
Common noun, singular; second member of the coordinated accusative object.

Das Projekt kostet viel Zeit und Geld.
